events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the kinked/flattened EMT bend fails NEC 358.24 (raceway deformation limits), with knock-on effects on Ch. 9 fill calculations and conductor insulation risk during pulling. Decision is `fail`, risk `medium` (no conductors pulled yet), with corrective actions to cut out and replace the defective section before conductor installation.
